betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6FEL (Free Electron Laser)§f

§aGenerate powerful laser wavelengths for isotope separation in the SILEX!§f

§bThe FEL§f is a pseudo-multiblock machine that works with the §bSILEX§f to produce laser wavelengths. It requires §e10.0 MHE§f power to activate and a §bLaser Crystal§f as a wavelength filter medium.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory, 20s, 100HE/t):
§b• 1×§f Lithium-Ion Battery
§b• 64×§f Dense Advanced Alloy Wire
§b• 12×§f Cast Steel Plate
§b• 16×§f Bakelite Bar
§b• 4×§f Polarized Lens
§b• 16×§f Capacitor
§b• 4×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6Laser Crystals§f:
§b• CO2-Desh§f (Infrared) — 75 kHE/s, burns you
§b• Bismuth§f (Visible) — 225 kHE/s, blinds you
§b• CMB-Schrabidate§f (UV) — 675 kHE/s, burns you
§b• Spark§f (Gamma) — 2.03 MHE/s, ~400 RAD/s
§b• Digamma§f — 6.08 MHE/s, ~0.2 DRX/s

§c⚠ Safety§f: Place SILEX at least §e2§f blocks away or it will melt. One FEL powers §e5§f SILEX units. Concrete stops the laser; glass lets it through!

§eTip§f: Start with the §bCO2-Desh crystal§f — it's the cheapest and sufficient for basic SILEX operations!
